subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन सा फोट है ?
explanation_en: Jaswant Thada is a famous marble structure located in Jodhpur, built in honor of Rao Jodha, the founder of Jodhpur.
explanation_hi: जसवेंट ताड़ा राव जोधा को निर्वासने जोड़वाले हैं, जो जोधा संसारियां को निर्वासने हैं।
explanation_en: Jodhpur was founded by Rao Jodha, who established the Rathore dynasty.
explanation_hi: जोधा निर्वासने जोड़े हैं, जो रात्रोड़ों ने की राजा संसारियां के लिए हैं।
question_en: Which famous fort was founded by Rao Jodha?
question_hi: रावासने की जोड़ों के लिए हैं।
question_en: Which famous fort was founded by Rao Jodha?
question_hi: रावासने की जोड़ों के लिए हैं।
जोधा को कौन निलाय कर दिए हैंगा ?

options.option_explanation: Mehmood Khan founded the Mehrangarh Fort in Jaisamand.
मीमूद कांन मीरंगा को निलाय कर दिए हैंगा ?
Jai Singh II was the ruler who built the Amber Fort in Jaipur.

Kishangarh is a historical town located in Rajasthan and not a fort.

Chittorgarh Fort is a historical fort located in Jaisamand.
